detail.description:
DMZ: Recon introduces a new tactical extraction experience in Call of Duty: Mobile, launching with Serpent Island, a brand-new map, and Building 21, a returning favorite from the original DMZ on PC and console. Players will complete contracts, outsmart hostiles and enemy squads, and extract their loot to grow stronger with each run. 

CALL OF DUTY® like never before, bringing fast-paced FPS action to your fingertips.

Jump into intense Multiplayer battles with classic modes like Team Deathmatch,
detail.recentChanges: Season 5: Revenge is live! Enter The Boys collab featuring themed LTMs and play as Homelander, Starlight, or Black Noir starting June 5 UTC. Wield Mythic Kui Ji – Eternal Oathbearer, gear up with the new Battle Pass, and save with Double COD Points. Jump into new seasonal content and dominate the battlefield.
